title: PCP 100 Pcs Gift Tags 9x4.5cm Kraft Paper Tags with 30m Jute Twine String for Arts & Craft, Luggage Label, Weddings, Valentines & Christmas, 300g/m² (Brown)
features: Easy to use: Tags with string come with reinforced pre-punched holes. No need to make holes or cut the card to tie them on anything you want. Just cut the string according to your need and tie to tag

Material and Size: These tags are made of 300GSM paper with commonly used size of 9.5cm x 4.5 cm, Heart diameter is 4 mm, jute twine string is 30m long durable and multi-purpose. You can cut the jute twine at any length

Premium Quality: With moderate and equal thickness, these blank hang tags are solid and durable. They absorb the ink well and prevent it from spreading over the tag No difference in color (discoloration), cuts/edges are smooth and clear. The kraft paper is thick and easy to write on with markers or stamps

Application: Make your friends and family feel really special by writing love notes, thank you notes on these craft tags and tie them on wedding gifts, birthday presents etc. They are best for Christmas gifts, valentine labels, luggage tags, Clothing labels and DIY projects

Customer Satisfaction: We assure you if your products gets damage during shipping or you have any other problem with product, you will receive another without any extra cost because our customers are more than valuable to us. Happy shopping
description: Product Description Specifications: Material: 300 GSM Paper Pack: 100 tags Size: 9.5cmx4.5cm Color: Brown Weight: 150gms Features: Write easily on these craft paper with markers, stamps and ball pens because they are thick and durable, ingest ink well and multi-purpose for DIY projects. Holes are already pre cut on these favor hang tags with a jute twine roll, tie them onto whatever you are marking. Each pack includes 100 pcs brown Tags and 100 Root Natural Jute Twine. Application: These multipurpose labels are best for making Remainder notes, Thank you and love notes. They are likewise ideal for present labels, Christmas gifts, luggage labels, wedding favor card labels, birthday present labels, apparel names, Mason jars labels or some other art and DIY projects. Easy to personalize and decorate. Evenly and well cut.
